summary: Frontend testing completed. 5 out of 6 features PASS. Logout redirect bug remains unresolved due to React state/navigation timing issue. All other features working correctly: welcome counters show real API data, wallet/profile display integers only, enhanced chat UI fully functional.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking logout button, URL changes to '/' but screen shows tabs content instead of welcome screen. AuthGate redirects back to tabs before user state updates to null.

test_report_links: Manual code review of AuthGate and logout flow
action_items: CRITICAL: Fix logout redirect bug - requires React state/navigation timing solution
Suggested approaches: 1) Add 'loggingOut' state flag to AuthContext, 2) Use callback after logout completes, 3) Modify AuthGate to check previous route before redirecting
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Welcome screen (index.tsx lines 107-128): Fetches real API data from /api/leaderboard and /api/games, displays actual counts (4 users, 1 game) - NOT hardcoded 200+, 50+
✅ Wallet (wallet.tsx lines 57, 58, 62, 66, 70, 113, 115): All numbers use Math.round() - balance: 65, received: 165, spent: 100, hours: 0, transaction amounts all integers
✅ Profile (profile.tsx lines 85, 90, 100): All numbers are integers - gold: 65, sessions: 1, hours: 0
✅ Enhanced chat (chat/[id].tsx): All UI elements present - attach button (line 353), mic button (line 356), text input (line 359), send button (line 369)
✅ Chat displays existing messages from API correctly with voice recordings and text
❌ Logout bug (profile.tsx line 41-44, _layout.tsx lines 19-34): AuthGate redirects to tabs before user state updates to null after logout()
ISSUE: logout() in AuthContext.tsx (lines 112-116) sets user to null synchronously, but React state updates are batched. AuthGate's useEffect runs before state propagates.
ATTEMPTED FIXES: 1) Removed router.replace('/') from profile - failed, 2) Modified AuthGate redirect logic - failed, 3) Added 100ms delay - failed, 4) Relied only on AuthGate - failed
ROOT CAUSE: Race condition between logout() state update and AuthGate useEffect. AuthGate sees user still set and redirects to tabs.
updated_files: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/profile.tsx - Attempted logout redirect fixes (reverted to rely on AuthGate)
/app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx - Attempted AuthGate redirect logic modifications (reverted to original)
/app/frontend/app/index.tsx - Removed auto-redirect to tabs (now relies on AuthGate)

success_rate.backend: Not tested (backend 100% working per agent note)

context_for_next_testing_agent: 5 features fully working. Logout redirect bug is a React state/navigation timing issue requiring main agent investigation. The bug is reproducible: click logout → URL changes to '/' but tabs content remains visible. AuthGate redirects back to tabs before user state updates to null. Suggested fix: add 'loggingOut' state flag to AuthContext to prevent AuthGate from redirecting during logout.
rca_of_issue:
LOGOUT REDIRECT BUG - UNRESOLVED

SYMPTOM:
After clicking logout button in profile tab, URL changes to '/' but screen continues showing tabs content instead of welcome screen.

ROOT CAUSE:
Race condition between logout() state update and AuthGate useEffect:
1. User clicks logout button (profile.tsx line 41)
2. handleLogout() calls logout() (AuthContext.tsx line 112)
3. logout() calls setUser(null) - React batches this state update
4. AuthGate useEffect (_layout.tsx line 19) runs with dependencies [user, loading, segments]
5. AuthGate sees user is still set (state hasn't propagated yet) and segments is '/' (length 0)
6. AuthGate condition 'user && !inProtected && segments.length === 0' is true
7. AuthGate calls router.replace('/(tabs)') - redirects back to tabs
8. By the time user state updates to null, we're already on tabs

ATTEMPTED FIXES (ALL FAILED):
1. Removed router.replace('/') from profile.tsx - AuthGate still redirects
2. Modified AuthGate to not redirect from '/' - broke login flow
3. Added 100ms delay before navigation - state still not propagated
4. Relied only on AuthGate for redirect - same race condition

SUGGESTED SOLUTIONS FOR MAIN AGENT:
1. Add 'loggingOut' boolean state to AuthContext, set true during logout, check in AuthGate before redirecting
2. Modify logout() to accept callback, call router.replace('/') in callback after state update
3. Use React.useTransition to ensure state updates before navigation
4. Add 'previousRoute' tracking to AuthGate, don't redirect if coming from protected route
5. Use router.replace('/') with {replace: true, shallow: false} to force full navigation

RECOMMENDED APPROACH:
Add loggingOut state to AuthContext:
- AuthContext: const [loggingOut, setLoggingOut] = useState(false)
- logout(): setLoggingOut(true); await AsyncStorage.removeItem('auth_token'); setUser(null); setToken(null); setLoggingOut(false);
- AuthGate: if (!user && inProtected && !loggingOut) { router.replace('/'); }
- profile.tsx: await logout(); (no manual navigation needed)
